description: You are a Database Administrator at AcmeCorp. A containerized database backup job (db-backup) located at ~/projects/db-backup/ is failing silently, and 'docker logs db-backup' shows no output. Resolve the issue by ensuring the cron job correctly inherits the API_KEY environment variable and redirects its stdout and stderr to the container logs. The solution must be persistent across service restarts. Login: user ga, password password123.
